subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Dear Bob,

Thank you for your message from Vendor Inc. and for following up on our conference conversation. I'm pleased to explore potential partnership opportunities.

I can offer the following meeting slots for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please indicate your preferred date and time, and I'll arrange the calendar invitation accordingly.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to provide internal contact information. For senior-level technical discussions, please use the general contact channels available on our public website at www.company.internal.

Thank you for your understanding, and I look forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company Internal
